intent_tree: {"写一个Python程序，快速找到并检测MP3文件的音频清晰度": {"查找指定目录中的所有MP3文件": {}, "分析音频文件的清晰度质量": {"检测音量是否过低": {}, "检测静音部分是否过多": {}, "检测峰值音量是否不足": {}}, "使用多线程加速处理": {}, "输出检测结果并标记问题文件": {}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "解析命令行参数以获取目标目录和线程数"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "递归扫描指定目录下的所有MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "初始化多线程执行器以加速音频分析"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "加载音频文件并提取前30秒的音频数据"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "计算音频的RMS值以评估音量水平"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "计算音频的最大振幅以评估峰值音量"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "计算音频中静音部分的比例"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "根据阈值判断音频是否存在质量问题"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "记录问题文件及其具体问题"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "生成最终检测报告并输出统计信息"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "directoryInput"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "fileList"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "threadExecution"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "audioData"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node6", "type": "audioData"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node7", "type": "audioData"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node8", "type": "volumeCheck"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node8", "type": "peakVolumeCheck"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "silenceCheck"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "issueLogging"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "reportGeneration"}]}
